section_name: General Powers of District; Governmental Functions
text:
(a) A district has all powers necessary or convenient to carry out the purposes of this chapter.

(b) A district may generally perform all acts necessary for the full exercise of the district’s powers.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 172. Rural Rail Transp. Districts
##### § 172.151 — General Powers of District; Governmental Functions

(a) A district has all powers necessary or convenient to carry out the purposes of this chapter.

(b) A district may generally perform all acts necessary for the full exercise of the district’s powers.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A district has all powers necessary or convenient to carry out the purposes of this chapter.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: A district may generally perform all acts necessary for the full exercise of the district’s powers.
